title: charter synthesize --adapter fixture --json (envelope + on-disk artifacts)
description: Strict envelope emitted by `spec-kitty charter synthesize --adapter fixture --json` PLUS the on-disk artifacts the call must produce. Locks behavior for FR-004. Field set and artifact list are illustrative — WP01 research must confirm against current behavior and update before WP03 commits.

result.description: Outcome marker. `success` indicates synthesis completed and artifacts were written.

adapter.description: Adapter identity, e.g. `fixture`. Echoed from the invocation.

written_artifacts.description: Paths actually written by this invocation.

x-on-disk-artifacts.description: After a successful invocation, the following must exist on disk under the project root. WP01 research must confirm exact filenames against current synthesizer output.
x-on-disk-artifacts.policy: The E2E asserts these paths exist after `synthesize --json` returns success. The test must NOT seed any of these paths beforehand (FR-004, C-001).
